text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Today's the day our training begins! I'm so glad to work with youuu!
choice_data_list: Same here! Let's start out strong!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll put my all into whatever you throw at me! Just tell me what
to do!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah, you wanted to talk before practice, right? What is it? What
should we talk about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before starting formal training, I need to properly understand the
racer and her abilities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the Umamusume without trainers were drilled by academy
instructors, and according to the notes they gave me...
choice_data_list:
You're constantly rushing during races, aren't
you?

You're constantly rushing during races, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaah! I get that a lot! But I have a hard time keeping it cool...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Every Umamusume gets heated up in a race, don't they? I get caught
up in the energy—that feeling of, like, "waaagh!" I can't help it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
My instructor at the academy used to say, "You lay your emotions
completely bare."

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Is that really true though? I always thought that was pretty normal.
choice_data_list: You know the story 60,000 Furlongs in Search of Mother?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The story about Umako?! Yeah, yeah! I know it! I saw the anime! I
even read the book in school!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What a great story, riiight?! The first episode where Umako finds the
little girl's lost carrot was so... touching!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ug... Hic... Umako! Such a kind child! Waaah!
choice_data_list: You really do lay everything bare!
You really do lay everything bare!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Say whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This extreme earnestness might really be Winning Ticket's weakness.
Still—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! You okay?! Did you get lost in your own head?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait, wait, wait... Is how I'm behaving really bad?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh nooooo! How could I annoy you like this? I'm useless... I'm the
wooorst!
choice_data_list: There's nothing wrong with your behavior.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But even during tryouts, I got overexcited and ended up in fifth...
choice_data_list:
Someday, that personality of yours is going to
be a powerful weapon.

Someday, that personality of yours is going to
be a powerful weapon.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You mean it?! A weapon... Yeah... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can remember to let loose at just the right time, her earnest
attitude will be her greatest weapon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So what she needs to focus on now is judging when that right moment
is. She has to run according to a plan.
choice_data_list: Okay, Ticket, here's what you need to do!
Okay, Ticket, here's what you need to do!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooah! What, what, what?
choice_data_list: Study like you've never studied before!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I have to... study?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Guhyaaagh! You gotta be kidding meeeee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus begins my days of arduous training with Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hyaaaaagh! Phew!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: How was that, Trainer? I ran at full speed!
choice_data_list:
Well, we're working on your pace, so
maintaining a steady time is more important...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Time? What?! How'd I forget thaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'll go again! Hyaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Finish in a minute! Finish in a minute!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? I made it here in twenty seconds. Is that too slow? Too fast?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaagh! I dunnooooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Let's see. The favorite for this race couldn't win it. But why...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ah! She didn't train enough! So if I try extra hard in training, it's in the
bag! You gotta train to gain!
choice_data_list: You don't think there might be another reason?
You don't think there might be another reason?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Another?! Like... like what?
choice_data_list:
She went too close on the turn and got
surrounded by the pack.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Gaaaaah! You're totally right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not really something that needs saying, but using her head's not
her strong point. It's a bit of an obstacle in training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But then...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock! Coming in!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heya, Trainer! I watched tons of those racing videos I borrowed
yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And get this! I took notes on how I could run better. You gotta take a
look!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's late, huh? I didn't mean to disturb you.
choice_data_list:
No problem! I see you're at full speed like
always.

No problem! I see you're at full speed like
always.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nothing less!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I always pull out all the stops, but... I dunno—I feel like I can pull way
more stops than before!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, you're serious about this, right? About winning the Derby!
choice_data_list: Yeah, that's what I promised, right?
Yeah, that's what I promised, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm totally getting that vibe from you! You've always felt that
way!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
My trainer really believes in me! It gives me the energy to try harder
than I've ever tried before!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sooo... Thanks so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The going was tough for a while there, but with all the effort she's
putting in, I really feel like she can figure this out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know she has loads of room to grow!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! What did you think about my running ideas?!
choice_data_list: They, well... Let's rethink them together!
They, well... Let's rethink them together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That baaad?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She can do it... I'm pretty sure!
